name: Study the Stars

abilities.name: Astronomical Observations
abilities.text: When this model succeeds in an opposed duel with an enemy model, it may drain a (t) to write the suit and value of the opposing model's card into its star chart. Jokers may not be added to the star chart.

abilities.name: The Stars Shift
abilities.text: When this model flips, cheats, or discards a non-joker card, it may treat that card as a card listed in its star chart. If it does so, erase that card from its star chart.

extraction_notes: Card includes a 'STAR CHART' component with 4 empty boxes for tracking cards
Star chart is a game mechanic where cards can be recorded and later used
